SciPat example dashboard

Reference dashboard built from the full bundled Scopus and WIPO example corpora in src/example_data. It now leads with the strongest paper-versus-patent comparisons: zero-centered keyword balance, a 3D semantic balance network, cleaned community/network diagnostics, temporal evidence, and subdomain correspondence views.

Documents4639
Vocabulary160
Edges365
Optimal threshold0.550
Open standalone algorithm explorer Browse full visualization gallery

SciPat publication-style comparative summary

Multi-panel paper-ready figure combining threshold structure, community sizes, corpus timeline, and centrality signature.

SciPat keyword modality balance

Zero-centered keyword balance plot showing which semantically important terms are more paper-led or more patent-led, with exact support counts in hover.

SciPat paper-vs-patent semantic balance network

3D semantic network with a zero-centered balance axis for paper-heavy versus patent-heavy keywords, while hover reports exact support counts.

SciPat semantic keyword network — 2D

2D semantic keyword network colored by the selected community partition.

SciPat semantic keyword network — 3D

3D semantic keyword network colored by the selected community partition.

SciPat algorithm comparison network

Stable-layout keyword network recolored by multiple community-finding algorithms, with hover summaries showing paper and patent support per keyword.

SciPat algorithm partition summary

Algorithm-level summary of community counts and modularity.

SciPat keyword similarity heatmap

Similarity matrix heatmap highlighting the strongest semantic keyword relations.

SciPat keyword embedding projection

Two-dimensional embedding projection to inspect semantic keyword geometry and community separation.

SciPat keyword centrality scatter

Keyword salience map using weighted degree and betweenness centrality.

SciPat community keyword summary

Top ranked keywords within the leading communities.

SciPat community keyword modality profile

Top keywords per community with paper-versus-patent support counts so thematic leadership is visible by modality.

SciPat inter-community connectivity matrix

Aggregated edge-weight matrix showing intra- and inter-community semantic connectivity.

SciPat threshold diagnostics

Threshold sweep diagnostics across the semantic similarity grid.

SciPat parameter grid heatmap

Threshold-versus-resolution heatmap for the parameter search grid.

SciPat threshold uncertainty bands

Rolling uncertainty envelopes that highlight local variability around threshold-sweep metrics.

SciPat component persistence

Persistent homology summary showing Betti components across thresholds.

SciPat document modality timeline

Document counts by year and modality across papers and patents.

SciPat document-to-community assignment heatmap

Heatmap of how strongly each high-signal document maps onto semantic communities.

SciPat patent IPC treemap

Patent IPC landscape distilled from the attached WIPO export.

SciPat domain balance

Domain-share trajectories for papers and patents across time.

SciPat subdomain paper and patent counts

Direct paper-versus-patent document counts for each SciPat subdomain so the full thematic balance is visible at a glance.

SciPat domain overlap and lead-lag diagnostics

Overlap and lag structure between paper and patent trajectories for each domain.

SciPat paper-patent content correspondence by subdomain

Shared keyword correspondence inside each subdomain, showing which concepts are supported by both papers and patents.

SciPat keyword rank-frequency diagnostics

Log-log keyword rank-frequency curve with a Zipf-style reference for lexical concentration analysis.

SciPat temporal evolution summary

Temporal evolution of community counts and modality balance.

SciPat temporal stability diagnostics

Sliding-window diagnostics for community stability, overlap, and keyword retention.

SciPat temporal graph diagnostics

Window-by-window graph-size, density, component concentration, and paper/patent document counts.

SciPat keyword popularity over time

Sliding-window trajectories for the most supported keywords across the combined corpus, papers, and patents.
